creator: ports@thelanman.net
text:
Created attachment 177601
poudriere build log

I was rebuilding my local poudriere packages and got the change options for the new 1.0 release. I added the TokyoCabinet MHASH option and the build fails on the configure step. It doesn't look like the databases/tokyocabinet is actually built as a dependency.

I've attached the poudriere build log. The Makefile looks correct, so not sure why it's not pulling the dependency.
